message:
fix: watch channel ordering, transport sink enhancements, and misc runtime fixes

watch channel: receiver_count is now read after the value update and
version bump rather than before, preventing a TOCTOU race where a
receiver could drop between the count read and the value write, causing
wake_all_waiters to be called with a stale count while the last
receiver has already gone. Both send() and modify() are updated.

transport/sink: expanded SymbolSink trait and implementations (details
in diff — test helpers, backpressure support, error handling).

types/resource: additions to pool configuration types.

runtime/scheduler/worker: minor scheduling adjustments.

runtime/builder: configuration update.

lab/scenario_runner: test infrastructure adjustment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
